title: syringa pubescens subsp. microphylla
intro: Syringa pubescens subsp. microphylla, also known as the Chinese lilac or dwarf lilac, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Syringa pubescens subsp. microphylla include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
